message:
feat(raptorq): publish F7 factor-cache burst-decode comparator evidence (v1+v2)

Publish measured performance evidence for the F7 factor-cache optimization
decision, covering both single-scenario and multi-scenario comparators.

New artifacts:
  - raptorq_track_f_factor_cache_p95p99_v1.json: single deterministic
    burst-decode workload (RQ-F7-CACHE-BURST-CMP-001) with p50/p95/p99
    timing for cold, baseline, warmed, and rollback paths. Shows 25/25
    deterministic cache hits in warmed scenario.
  - raptorq_track_f_factor_cache_p95p99_v2.json: expanded to 3 scenarios
    (k=48, symbol_size={1024,1536,2048}, varying drop patterns). Documents
    that material_gain_scenarios=0 with unresolved warmed-cache tail-latency
    variability — the remaining closure blocker.

Decision record updates:
  - raptorq_optimization_decision_records_v1.json: add measured_comparator_evidence
    section for F7, update closure_blockers to reflect published artifacts
  - raptorq_optimization_decision_records.md: add evidence-harvest entries,
    update coverage_summary (cards_with_measured_comparator_evidence 6->7)

CI regression gates (+311 lines):
  - g2_f7_burst_cache_p95p99_report(): single-scenario regression test
  - g2_f7_burst_cache_p95p99_multiscenario_report(): multi-scenario test
    covering conservative cold vs warmed cache-reuse measurement paths

Decoder refinements:
  - src/raptorq/decoder.rs: policy telemetry and cache tracking adjustments
    to support new measurement infrastructure

Ref: asupersync-n5fk6 #1194, #1207; asupersync-3ltrv #1896, #1907

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -494,7 +494,8 @@
         "measured_highlights": [
           "Implementation evidence is landed: deterministic dense-factor cache + strict signature checks + bounded eviction telemetry (thread asupersync-n5fk6 msg #1194).",
           "Follow-up implementation evidence is landed: matrix-skeleton reuse (`DenseFactorArtifact`) plus deterministic cache decision telemetry and collision tracking (thread asupersync-n5fk6 msg #1207).",
-          "Closure-grade burst comparator (p95/p99) and rollback outcome artifacts are still pending publication."
+          "F7 comparator artifacts are published: artifacts/raptorq_track_f_factor_cache_p95p99_v1.json (single-scenario) and artifacts/raptorq_track_f_factor_cache_p95p99_v2.json (multi-scenario).",
+          "Latest multi-scenario comparator (v2) shows deterministic cache hits in all scenarios but 0/3 scenarios satisfy current material p95/p99 gain thresholds; runs continue to show tail-latency variability with occasional warmed-cache p95 regressions."
         ]
       },
       "risk_class": "high",
@@ -505,7 +506,7 @@
       ],
       "adoption_wedge": {
         "phase": "implementation landed; closure evidence pending",
-        "strategy": "Keep guarded/proposed state until burst comparator and rollback artifacts are attached, then promote to approved_guarded.",
+        "strategy": "Keep guarded/proposed state until burst comparator and rollback artifacts show material p95/p99 gain across representative workloads, then promote to approved_guarded.",
         "enable_controls": [
           "cache capacity cap",
           "equivalence verdict enforcement"

+        ],
+        "bench_repro_commands": [
+          "cargo test --test ci_regression_gates g2_f7_burst_cache_p95p99_report -- --nocapture",
+          "cargo test --test ci_regression_gates g2_f7_burst_cache_p95p99_multiscenario_report -- --nocapture",
+          "cargo test --test ci_regression_gates g2_f7_factor_cache_observed -- --nocapture"
+        ],
+        "notes": [
+          "Comparator artifact includes baseline, warmed_cache, and rollback_proxy p50/p95/p99 metrics for deterministic burst scenario RQ-F7-CACHE-BURST-CMP-001.",
+          "Warmed cache path hit factor cache in 25/25 samples, confirming deterministic reuse activation.",
+          "Multi-scenario comparator artifact (v2) expands coverage to three deterministic burst workloads with per-scenario p95/p99 deltas and rollback-proxy captures.",
+          "v2 summary currently reports material_gain_scenarios = 0 and tail-latency variability across reruns, so closure-grade gain remains unproven."
+        ],
+        "pending_blockers": [
+          "Demonstrate material p95/p99 latency and throughput gain on representative burst workloads; current v2 corpus (3 scenarios) still yields 0 scenarios meeting material-gain thresholds.",
+          "Eliminate or explain warmed-cache tail-risk variability observed in the multi-scenario comparator corpus before promoting from proposed to approved_guarded."
+        ]
+      },
       "deterministic_replay": {
         "seed": 424242,
         "fixture_or_scenario_id": "RQ-G1-E2E-BURST-LATE",

-      "Promote F7 from proposed to approved_guarded only after burst-workload comparator evidence (including p95/p99 deltas) and rollback rehearsal outcomes are attached as concrete artifacts; current anchors #1194/#1207 confirm implementation quality but are not closure-grade comparator/rollback evidence (G7 dependency contract reruns are green per asupersync-m7o6i comment #1886 and coord msg #1520).",
+      "Promote F7 from proposed to approved_guarded only after published burst-workload comparator + rollback artifacts demonstrate material p95/p99 gain across representative workloads; current artifacts (`artifacts/raptorq_track_f_factor_cache_p95p99_v1.json`, `artifacts/raptorq_track_f_factor_cache_p95p99_v2.json`) confirm deterministic cache behavior, but v2 still reports material_gain_scenarios=0 and tail-latency variability across reruns.",
       "Keep F8 as template/proposed until implementation exists; thread asupersync-2zu9p currently has no implementation/evidence anchors, so measured overlap-vs-sequential evidence and rollback outcomes remain entirely pending."
     ]
   }

+    "Warmed cache p50/p95 latency is modestly lower than baseline in this scenario, but p99 latency is slightly worse.",
+    "Rollback-proxy conservative mode remains close to baseline and serves as deterministic fallback evidence."
+  ],
+  "limitations": [
+    "Evidence is currently single-scenario and should be expanded to additional burst regimes for closure-grade confidence.",
+    "Throughput percentiles are derived from per-sample wall-time and bytes recovered, not from Criterion raw sample streams.",

-1. Promote `F7` from proposed to approved_guarded only after burst comparator evidence + rollback rehearsal outcomes are recorded.
+1. Promote `F7` from proposed to approved_guarded only after published burst comparator + rollback artifacts demonstrate material p95/p99 gain across representative workloads (`artifacts/raptorq_track_f_factor_cache_p95p99_v1.json` and `artifacts/raptorq_track_f_factor_cache_p95p99_v2.json` are now published; v2 expands to three workloads but still reports `material_gain_scenarios=0` with unresolved warmed-cache tail-latency variability across reruns).
 2. Keep `F8` as proposed/template until implementation exists, then attach overlap-vs-sequential evidence and rollback outcomes.
 
 Recent evidence alignment updates (2026-02-19):
@@ -119,4 +119,6 @@ Recent evidence alignment updates (2026-02-20):
 - Added independent support refresh (`asupersync-3ltrv` comment `#1896`, agent-mail thread `asupersync-3ltrv` msg `#1555`): fresh `bv --robot-next` still ranks G3 top-impact; targeted `cargo test --test raptorq_perf_invariants g3_decision -- --nocapture` rerun is PASS (2/2), and cross-agent request for latest E5/F7/F8 closure anchors has been rebroadcast in-thread.
 - Added focused F7/F8 evidence-harvest integration (`asupersync-3ltrv` comment `#1907`, agent-mail `#1587`): F7 implementation anchors are now explicit (`asupersync-n5fk6` thread msgs `#1194/#1207`), but promotion remains blocked pending closure-grade burst comparator (p95/p99) + rollback outcome artifacts; F8 remains open with no thread evidence anchors in `asupersync-2zu9p`.
 - Added latest post-frontier verification: `cargo test --test raptorq_perf_invariants g3_decision -- --nocapture` PASS (2/2) after repair of unrelated compile-frontier issues.
+- Added eleventh-slice F7 comparator/rollback artifact publication: `artifacts/raptorq_track_f_factor_cache_p95p99_v1.json` generated from deterministic burst comparator command `cargo test --test ci_regression_gates g2_f7_burst_cache_p95p99_report -- --nocapture` plus rollback rehearsal command `cargo test --test ci_regression_gates g2_f7_factor_cache_observed -- --nocapture` (both PASS). G3 blocker wording was tightened: F7 now has concrete comparator+rollback artifacts but still needs closure-grade material p95/p99 gain across broader workload coverage.
+- Added twelfth-slice F7 multi-scenario comparator publication: `artifacts/raptorq_track_f_factor_cache_p95p99_v2.json` generated from `cargo test --test ci_regression_gates g2_f7_burst_cache_p95p99_multiscenario_report -- --nocapture` + rollback rehearsal command `cargo test --test ci_regression_gates g2_f7_factor_cache_observed -- --nocapture` (PASS). Coverage is broader (3 deterministic burst workloads), but current outcome is still non-closure-grade (`material_gain_scenarios=0`) with unresolved warmed-cache tail-latency variability across reruns.
 - Removed stale compile-mismatch blocker text and reconciled closure blockers to current state (E5 publication/sign-off cleared; F7/F8 remain).
